variables.name: callersName
variables.description: Parameterized variable, so you can change it when testing. For sending to AI Agent

variables.name: virtualAgent_StateEventName
variables.description: State Event Name from Virtual Agent

variables.name: Global_Language
variables.description: System-defined variable to store the language

variables.name: Global_VoiceName
variables.description: System-defined variable to store the voice name

variables.name: product
variables.description: Variable to contain Acme Corp Product customer is interesting in purchasing:  Anvils, Rockets, ...

variables.name: qty
variables.description: Quantity of Acme Corp Products the Customer wants to buy
variables.desktopLabel: Quantity of Acme Corp Products to Purchase

variables.name: deliveryStatus
variables.description: Status of the Order Delivery from DB Lookup

variables.name: customersRealName
variables.description: Customers Real Name via firstName and lastName fields from DB Lookup

properties.name: SetVariable_Escalated_Path
properties.description: Capture Variables returned from the Virtual Agent using the Escalated Path, which should have been a result of an "Agent" intent in the Virtual Agent.

properties.name: QueueContact_Acme
properties.description: Queue to call to check out data returned - nothing special here, but look for variables on the desktop when the agent answers.
properties.destination:name: Instructor_Voice_Q

properties.name: QueueContact_Acme_soc
properties.description: Queue to call to check out data returned - nothing special here, but look for variables on the desktop when the agent answers.
properties.destination:name: Instructor_Voice_Q

properties.name: Play_IVR_Message
properties.description: Play a simple IVR message to start.
properties.connector:name: Cisco Cloud Text-to-Speech

properties.name: Debug_Handled_Path
properties.description:
Capture Variables returned from the Virtual Agent using the Handled Path, which should have been a result of an "Handled" intent in the Virtual Agent.
Just for debugging purposes.

properties.name: Parse_AI_MetaData_4_acctNumber
properties.description: Parse the Metadata returned to get the callers account number
properties.contentType:name: JSON

properties.name: retrieveOrderDetails_fromDB
properties.httpRequestMethod:name: GET
properties.description: Fetch Order from Database
properties.httpContentType:name: Application/JSON
properties.contentType:name: JSON

properties.name: Play_Callers_Real_Name_in_IVR
properties.description: Play Callers Real Name from the DB Lookup
properties.connector:name: Cisco Cloud Text-to-Speech

promptsTts.value:
Welcome back to the Voice Flow {{callersName}}, it would appear your Real Name is {{customersRealName}}, which we found by looking up your account number in the Database.  No problem, we all have aliases.

We'll pass this information back to the Virtual Agent, along with your Order Status as well as your Safe Location, again using a Virtual Agent V2 node with a matching Event Name.

If this all works, recognize this flow will have gone from the Contact Center IVR to the AI Agent, back to the IVR (for a DB Lookup function) and then back to an AI Agent for additional treatment.  

Follow the bouncing ball.
promptsTts.name:
Welcome back to the Voice Flow {{callersName}}, it would appear your Real Name is {{customersRealName}}, which we found by looking up your account number in the Database.  No problem, we all have aliases.

We'll pass this information back to the Virtual Agent, along with your Order Status as well as your Safe Location, again using a Virtual Agent V2 node with a matching Event Name.

If this all works, recognize this flow will have gone from the Contact Center IVR to the AI Agent, back to the IVR (for a DB Lookup function) and then back to an AI Agent for additional treatment.  

Follow the bouncing ball.

properties.name: VirtualAgentV2_part2
properties.description: Back to the Virtual Agent for secondary processing, whatever that may be.  Sending the customerRealName as well as the deliveryStatus and safeLocation just to prove that we can send more data along with the subsequent request.
properties.connector:name: Webex AI Agent (Scripted)
properties.virtualAgentId:name: MK_Demo_Scripted_4Voice(MK_Demo_Scripted-4Voice)

properties.name: Parse_AI_MetaData_4_product_qty
properties.description: Parse the Metadata returned to get the Product to order and the Quantity
properties.contentType:name: JSON

properties.name: PlayMessage_Product_Qty
properties.description: Play a message to ensure the product and quantity has been passed back to the voice flow, and that the Parse node is doing it's job.
properties.connector:name: Cisco Cloud Text-to-Speech

promptsTts.value:
Looks like you need to order {{qty}} of our finest {{product}}.  If this message sounds correct, the product you are ordering as well as the quantity have been successfully passed back, and parsed, using the Escalated port on the V2 node.
An agent should answer the call and observe the data included in the Agent Desktop.
promptsTts.name:
Looks like you need to order {{qty}} of our finest {{product}}.  If this message sounds correct, the product you are ordering as well as the quantity have been successfully passed back, and parsed, using the Escalated port on the V2 node.
An agent should answer the call and observe the data included in the Agent Desktop.
